163.reason: [Error: Outputs error but still adds an AND token for a single '&', which is incorrect; should not add any token and must only report error]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.125 , reason:  [Error: When EOF is reached after a single '&', lineInd hasn't been updated to reflect the line of the '&', because nextChar() was never called for the '&' itself. Also, it incorrectly adds an AND token even though it's an error.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.125 , reason:  [Error: When EOF is reached after a single '&', lineInd hasn't been updated for the current '&' character yet, because nextChar() was never called for it. The error line number should be the line where '&' appears, but lineInd reflects the line after processing previous '\n'. Also, adding an AND token is incorrect when the input is erroneous.]
